data.name: Night of Love 🌓
data.detailed_description:
Wishlist our new game:


關於此遊戲

Night of Love is a kinetic novel about your return to your hometown.

Your once close friend died, and now you have to fulfill his last wish together with Jane, your ex-girlfriend.



However, Jane changed a lot since your breakup: her body shape, appearance and personality - she seems like different person now.

Besides, her attitude towards you changed as well, she's cold and indiferent towards you now.
However, a whole night spent together could change it...



Enjoy a unique story about true friendship and love together with Jane, remember your good old days, feel like a teenager again.

Maybe this will be the cure to your never-ending routine?



• About 4-5 hours of content.

• Unique touching story.

• HD fully original art by UKhansson.

• Relaxing nostalgic atmosphere.

data.short_description: Some things may seem unforgivable at the first, but a long night spent together may change everything and bring back the forgotten feelings...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB RAM
